text:
I feel a curious blend of anticipation and contemplation. The modern, carefully designed space whispers of innovation and thoughtfulness. Seeing 'R+D' and words about research and development, I note how this environment is inviting and open, yet also designed to spark reflection.

Pausing in front of the wall, I am drawn into the philosophical text—reminding me that every moment, even in a high-tech or academic setting, invites deeper questioning. I feel small in the sea of human innovation, but also quietly exhilarated to be part of a collective intellectual journey.
